---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, tracker adapter, or other improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to add or change.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you would like to see. If proposing a new tracker adapter, name the provider (e.g., GitLab, Jira, Backlog) and describe how it maps to the abstract contract in `references/tracker-contract.md`.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or references that may be useful.
